title: BS in Computer Science and Music with a Concentration in Music Technology - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
BS in Computer Science and Music with a Concentration in Music Technology - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
BS in Computer Science and Music with a Concentration in Music Technology
Apply now
Request info
The BS in Computer Science and Music with a Concentration in Music Technology explores how digital technologies enhance and sometimes challenge music composition and performance. This combined major (Khoury College and the College of Arts, Media and Design) provides a strong foundation in computing as you study composition for acoustic and electronic instruments. This program is recommended for students with an extensive background in music.
Explore program requirements in the course catalog
Program details
Career prospects
Career prospects
This program will prepare you with a diverse skill set at the intersection of music and technology. Here are some career paths where you could use this dual background:
Audio engineer or producer
Sound designer
Music software developer
Digital signal processing engineer
Game audio developer
Co-ops and internships
Co-ops and internships
During your time in this program you will have opportunities to apply your skills and build industry connections in co-ops. Some of our students’ recent co-op experiences include:
Audio visual assistant at Massachusetts Institute of Technology
Software engineer – VR/AR Research & Applications at Bose Corporation
Signal processing software co-op at DSP Concepts
Learn more about co-ops
Research opportunities
Research opportunities
Collaborate with some of the leading researchers in the field as you work on active research projects with real-world significance. Our research areas include:
Artificial intelligence
Data visualization
Games
Explore research at Khoury College
Learning outcomes
Learning outcomes
In this program, you’ll learn to:
Apply design principles in the construction of software systems of varying complexity.
Use current techniques, skills, and tools necessary for effective and secure computing practice.
Apply mathematical foundations, algorithmic principles, and computer science theory in the modeling and design of computer-based systems in a way that demonstrates comprehension of the tradeoffs involved in design choices.
Campus location
Boston
Located in the heart of Boston, Northeastern’s oldest campus is home to a vibrant community of students, researchers, and faculty working across disciplines to build a better world through CS.
Explore Boston's campus
Applications and admissions
Deadlines
Deadlines
Learn more about our undergraduate early action, early decision, and regular decision options.
Explore deadlines
Degree costs
Degree costs
Pursuing a world-class education is an investment in your future. It’s also one of the most important decisions you’ll ever make. Visit our Undergraduate Admissions site to find current Northeastern University costs. You can also estimate the cost of your degree using our College Cost Estimator or Net Price Calculator.
Find and estimate degree costs
Financial aid and scholarships
Financial aid and scholarships
Northeastern University offers a range of financial aid and scholarship opportunities to help you fund your education. You’ll receive an initial financial aid package that outlines your options after admission. Once you enroll, Khoury College has multiple scholarship opportunities for current students to continue supporting your studies. We also encourage all students to submit the FAFSA to determine your eligibility for federal aid and loans.
Learn more about scholarship opportunities
Have questions?
Have questions?
Let us know if you have any questions about the application or enrollment process. We are here to help!
Contact an enrollment counselor
Meet our faculty
Get to know the engaged, experienced professors who are here to support you every step of the way.
View all faculty
Bob De Schutter
Bob De Schutter is an associate professor at Khoury College, jointly appointed with the College of Arts, Media and Design. His game design work emphasizes the importance of older gamers and lifelong play, a mission reflected in his ownership of award-winning game company Lifelong Games LLC.
Read bio
Visit the College of Arts, Media and Design
The BS in Computer Science and Music with a Concentration in Music Technology program is an interdisciplinary collaboration with the College of Arts, Media and Design.
Learn about the College of Arts, Media and Design
Get a head start on your graduate degree
In our accelerated master’s programs, you can start earning your master’s degree while you are still pursuing your undergraduate studies.
Browse accelerated BS+MS programs
